zh.lifeSummary: 當Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay於1425年12月10日出生在英國蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾時，她的父親Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross29歲，母親Elizabeth Seton of Gordon21歲。她於1445年之前與Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay于1425年12月10日出生在英国苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾时，她的父亲Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross29岁，母亲Elizabeth Seton of Gordon21岁。她于1445年之前与Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan在苏格兰音巴內-爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Florence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

variants.name: Florance
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

nameMeanings.name: Flora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of flowers and the spring (a derivative of Latin flos ‘flower’, genitive floris). It is also the feminine form of the old Roman family name Florus, likewise derived from flos. Flora was little used in England before the 18th century, when it was imported from Scotland. In 1746 Flora Macdonald ( 1722–90 ) of Milton in South Uist helped Bonnie Prince Charlie to escape from there to the Island of Skye, disguised as a woman, after his defeat at Culloden. In fact, Flora was merely an Anglicized form of her Gaelic name, Fionnaghal, a variant of Fionnguala ( see Fionnuala ). However, her fame made the name Flora popular in the Highlands and elsewhere.

en.lifeSummary: When Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay was born on 10 December 1425, in Cromartyshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, was 21. She married Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan before 1445, in Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1463, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay est née le 10 décembre 1425, à Cromartyshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan avant 1445, à Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1463, à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay am 10. Dezember 1425 in Cromartyshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Seton of Gordon 21. Sie hat vor 1445 in Inverness-shire, Scotland Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Glenorchy, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay è nata il il 10 dicembre 1425 nel Cromartyshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan prima del 1445, nel Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1463, nel Glenorchy, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islayが1425年12月10日にイギリススコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Rossは29歳，母Elizabeth Seton of Gordonは21歳であった。1445年以前にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアでDuncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイで38歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay(이)가 1425년 12월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 크로마티실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Seton of Gordon(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1445년 이전 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay nasceu em 10 de dezembro de 1425, em Cromartyshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan antes 1445, em Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1463, em Glenorchy, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay родилась 10 декабря 1425 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan перед 1445 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1463 г. в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay nació el 10 de diciembre de 1425, en Cromartyshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Seton of Gordon, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan antes de 1445, en Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1463, en Glenorchy, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido.
